description: Recto (reuse): Letter from the fledgling cantor [...] b. Shelomo(?) al-Ḥalabī, in Malīj, to his mother, in Fustat (care of Hillel al-Fuqqāʿī in the druggists' market). In Judaeo-Arabic, with some unusual spellings. Dating: After ca. 1110 CE, based on the dating of the other side. The sender traveled from Fustat to Malīj, looking for a judge. He then went on to Shubrā, where he served as cantor, and then Damsīs, where he sang at a wedding. Now he has returned to Malīj. Greetings to family members and to his teacher the cantor. (Information in part from Goitein's note card.)
description_he: פנים (שימוש מחדש): מכתב מחזן צעיר בן שלמה(?) אל-חלבי ממליג' לאמו בפוסטאט; ביהודית-ערבית; מתאר נסיעות בין ערים ועבודה כחזן
